description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage-style toolbox with a dark reddish-brown leather-like exterior and reinforced black metal corner protectors. The front side features a sturdy, arched handle made of the same material as the body, attached with metal brackets, and two prominent black metal latches for securing the lid. The surface shows subtle wear and texture, suggesting durability and frequent use. The box has a solid, compact form with no visible external compartments or trays, and the lid fits snugly over the base. The corners and edges are reinforced for extra protection, and the overall design is utilitarian yet classic. No visible branding or external labels are present on the exterior.
description: A vintage, rectangular toolbox with a reddish-brown textured exterior, black metal corner protectors, a sturdy handle, and two front latches. The design is classic and utilitarian, with no visible branding or external compartments.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, reddish-brown surface with black corner protectors and no visible handle or latches.
description_view_1: The front view displays the arched handle, two black metal latches, and some surface wear, making it the most interactive side.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the rear, with a plain reddish-brown surface and black corner protectors, lacking any interactive features.
description_view_3: The top view highlights the flat, reddish-brown lid with all four black corner protectors visible, showing the box's solid construction.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed arched handle, rectangular cross-section, made of leather or leather-wrapped material, attached with metal brackets, ergonomic for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches, black in color, manually operated, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible or implied; appears to be a single large internal compartment.
